title: Replace logo with uploaded 'logo black.png' image

requirements.text: Save the uploaded logo image as 'dhimayu-logo-black.dim_400x400.png' in frontend/public/assets/generated/. Then update Header.tsx and Footer.tsx to replace the currently used logo image (dhimayu-logo.dim_400x400.png) with this new file. The image must be rendered without any background box, card, container, or bg-* Tailwind class behind it — it must blend seamlessly with the header and footer backgrounds. Display it at an appropriate size so the yin-yang shape, both dots, and the 'Dhi'/'MayU' text are all clearly legible.

quotes: use this image as the logo

acceptanceCriteria: The uploaded logo image is saved as dhimayu-logo-black.dim_400x400.png in frontend/public/assets/generated/
Header.tsx references dhimayu-logo-black.dim_400x400.png instead of the previous logo file
Footer.tsx references dhimayu-logo-black.dim_400x400.png instead of the previous logo file
No background color, bg-* class, or container box is applied behind the logo image in either Header or Footer
The logo renders with full transparency, blending seamlessly with the header and footer background surfaces
The yin-yang shape, both dots, and 'Dhi'/'MayU' text are clearly visible at the displayed size

constraints: Do not alter the logo image content — display it as-is without cropping, recoloring, or modifying the graphic
Do not add any white, cream, or colored background box or card behind the logo element
nonGoals: Changing any other aspect of the header or footer layout
Modifying the colour scheme or typography
Updating any page other than Header.tsx and Footer.tsx

edits: Remove white background to make it fully transparent, preserving the black yin-yang graphic, both dots, and 'Dhi'/'MayU' text exactly as-is (logo black.png > dhimayu-logo-black.dim_400x400.png)
